fees.note: Subscriptions incur the fee on every renewal. Wire transfer remains the cheapest path for 50-seat orders; route those via commercial@sdlc.cc.

products.name: sdlc-platform Commercial License — Annual
products.description: sdlc.cc is AGPL-3.0 open source. The commercial license lifts the AGPL source-disclosure obligation for organisations that embed the gateway inside a closed-source product, SaaS, or internal proprietary system. Pricing is per seat per year, where a seat is one end-user identity authorised to interact with the gateway. Includes a signed PDF license agreement within 24 hours of checkout, access to the private support channel (5 business day response), and a renewal price locked for two cycles. Full terms in COMMERCIAL.md. AGPL-3.0 remains available at no cost for users who comply with copyleft.

custom_fields.name: Organisation legal name
custom_fields.note: Inserted verbatim into the signed PDF.

image_prompts.hero: Off-white legal-pad background #F7F5EF, a single bound legal brief lying flat, oxblood #7A1F2B ribbon bookmark, the wordmark 'sdlc.cc' debossed in Source Serif 4 along the spine, no people, no devices, no gradients, soft natural light from upper-left. Mood: notarial seal, not SaaS marketing. Aspect 2:1, 1600x800.
image_prompts.icon: Monogram of 's' and 'c' interlocked in a thin-stroke serif, enclosed in a single hairline circle. Oxblood #7A1F2B mark on #F7F5EF field. Reads as an embossed seal. 512x512.
image_prompts.social_card: Oxblood title bar reading 'Commercial License — $4,000 / seat / year' in Source Serif 4 white; body underneath in Inter on #F7F5EF: 'AGPL-3.0 open source; commercial license lifts copyleft obligations.' No product screenshot. 1200x630.
image_prompts.thumbnail: The bound-brief image cropped to a square, ribbon bookmark visible top-right. 600x600.

products.name: sdlc-platform Setup Engagement
products.description: We deploy the sdlc.cc gateway inside your AWS, Azure, GCP, or on-prem environment, configure the DLP pattern bundle for your matter types (privileged communication, work product, client identifiers), wire SCIM and SSO against your identity provider, and hand over a runbook with a one-hour transfer call. Engagement runs one to two weeks calendar time. Sold standalone or alongside the Commercial License. AGPL-3.0 users may also purchase.

image_prompts.hero: A printed runbook with a tabbed index, open to a page titled 'Deployment runbook — sdlc.cc gateway'. Off-white #F7F5EF background, oxblood #7A1F2B tab markers, Source Serif 4 chapter heading visible. 1600x800.
image_prompts.icon: A simplified runbook silhouette in oxblood #7A1F2B line art on #F7F5EF. 512x512.
image_prompts.social_card: Title 'Setup Engagement — $5,000 one-time' in white on an oxblood bar; subtitle 'Gateway deployed in your VPC. DLP tuned to your matters. Runbook handover.' on #F7F5EF below. 1200x630.
image_prompts.thumbnail: Stack of three runbooks viewed from the spine, oxblood tabs protruding. 600x600.

products.name: sdlc-platform Support Contract
products.description: Three response-time tiers for organisations running sdlc.cc in production. Each tier covers bug triage, security advisories, and the upgrade path. Pro and Priority include a monthly check-in and a named contact. Sold standalone; you do not need the Commercial License to subscribe. Cancel any time; cancellation takes effect at the end of the current monthly cycle. Slack and email channels both supported.

variants.label: Pro
variants.sla: Response within 1 business day; monthly check-in.

variants.label: Priority
variants.sla: Response within 4 business hours; named contact; monthly check-in.

custom_fields.name: Slack workspace or email for support channel
custom_fields.note: We provision the channel within 1 business day.

custom_fields.name: Primary contact name
custom_fields.note: For the Priority tier this becomes the named-contact field.

image_prompts.hero: A telephone handset on a wooden desk beside an open binder labelled 'Incident Log', oxblood #7A1F2B ribbon marker, off-white #F7F5EF background, evening warm light. Conveys on-call seriousness without engineer-with-laptop cliché. 1600x800.
image_prompts.icon: A simple oxblood #7A1F2B line-art handset on #F7F5EF, hairline circle around it. 512x512.
image_prompts.social_card: Three columns labelled 'Basic', 'Pro', 'Priority' with response times underneath; oxblood header bar, Source Serif 4 typography. 1200x630.

products.name: Sponsor sdlc-platform
products.description: Mirror of the GitHub Sponsors funnel for buyers whose procurement team prefers LemonSqueezy invoicing over GitHub. Funds maintenance of the AGPL-3.0 open-source release. No license rights conveyed; this is a donation, not a purchase.

custom_fields.name: Public sponsor name (optional)
custom_fields.note: Shown in SPONSORS.md if provided. Leave blank for anonymous.

custom_fields.name: Comment
custom_fields.note: We may quote on the sponsors page.
